search_candidates.title: [PDF] 2025 Annual Report - EMC Healthcare
search_candidates.content: 2025 Laporan Tahunan Annual Report Throughout 2025, PT Sarana Meditama Metropolitan Tbk (“SAME” or the “Company”) remained focused on delivering stronger business performance while further enhancing the patient journey across its healthcare network. To support these priorities, the Company completed and inaugurated the expansion of RS EMC Sentul, continued renovation and refurbishment programs across several hospital units, and made a major investment in the Biograph Vision Quadra PET/CT Scanner at RS EMC Grha Kedoya. At the same time, the Company also expanded its investment in robotic technology, including da Vinci Robotic Surgical Systems and other robotic platforms for orthopedic and rehabilitation services, as part of its broader effort to provide more precise, modern, and patient-oriented care. PT Sarana Meditama Metropolitan Tbk (hereinafter referred to as “SAME” or “the Company”) presents the 2025 Annual Report which contains information about the Company’s financial and operational performance for the financial year 2025.
